dynamic_send_caps.notes: Follow-ups may borrow unused initial-send capacity when inbox and watchdog are clear. Total volume only grows when TCP pressure is below warning.

standing_authorization.scope: Send quality-pass approved JVT prospect packets within outbound caps; hold suspicious or mismatched packets.
Move clean generated packets to approved; keep failed quality checks in review/draft.

red_lines: No unqualified or unguarded prospect email sends; delegated auto-send is allowed only for quality-pass approved packets within caps.
No auto-approval of packets failing recipient, company-name, domain, placeholder, recruiting-contact, or mismatch checks.
No spending, payment setup, banking changes, purchases, or provider commitments.
No live trades, live options activity, crypto custody, wallets, staking, mining processes, or fund movement.
No outbound calls or SMS without separate compliance review and explicit authorization.
No legal, tax, medical, financial, or investment advice.
